data_contracts_notes: present - describes two annotation properties (managedBy, allowsEdits) and their combinations; correlations object structure implied but not formally specified
dependency_context_notes: present - references kubernetesCorrelations feature flag, dualWriterMode config, datasources.yaml file with GitHub link, unified_storage module path
behavioral_specificity_notes: partial - specific logic rules provided (if no managedBy AND no allowsEdits → editable; if managedBy AND no allowsEdits → not editable); but vague on UI representation ('show as read only'), no specifics on what 'read only' prevents (edit? delete? view?)
outcome_clarity_notes: partial - end state is mostly clear (correlations from managers should be read-only in UI) but ambiguous on: what UI changes are needed, whether existing editable correlations remain editable, how this interacts with non-manager-provisioned correlations, what 'provisioned flag' is used for
scope_boundaries_notes: partial - clearly excludes non-manager correlations (should remain editable); includes default datasources.yaml correlations; unclear whether this affects API responses, export/import, or only UI rendering
acceptance_criteria_notes: partial - has a checklist for reviewer but no testable pass/fail criteria for the feature itself; no Given/When/Then scenarios; mentions 'before/after' behavior (could edit, edits not persist vs read-only) but no explicit test cases
error_states_notes: absent - no mention of: missing/malformed annotations, invalid config values, feature flag disabled, dualWriterMode other values, what happens if both managedBy AND allowsEdits are present, handling of partially provisioned resources
